tasks.title: Build full PII/PHI scanner, reduction, migration, and retention platform
tasks.description: Turn ScanMeNow from a Phileas-derived redaction library into a full data governance engine for discovering, reducing, migrating, and retaining sensitive data. Parent epic for all Phase 1-7 subtasks.

tasks.title: Group A - Project Setup & CLI Foundation
tasks.description: Python project initialization with uv, Typer CLI scaffold, basic smoke tests, and project structure (22 subtasks)
tasks.plan:
## Overview

Establish the Python project foundation for ScanMeNow: uv-managed project skeleton, Presidio+spaCy detection core, and SQLite findings storage — all verified by smoke tests. No Firestore, no file walkers, no Electron yet.

## Phases

1. Python Project Scaffold — uv init, src/scanmenow/ layout, pyproject.toml, tests/, pytest config, Typer CLI entry point
2. Detection Core Integration — Presidio Analyzer + Anonymizer + spaCy en_core_web_lg, all with smoke tests
3. Local Findings Storage — SQLite schema (ScanJob, Finding, Evidence), CRUD, CSV export, smoke test

## First Proof Unit

Run: uv run scanmenow --help
Expected: exits 0, prints Typer help text
Initial failure: entry point not wired

proofUnits.title: CLI scaffold smoke test
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: uv run scanmenow --help exits 0 and prints Typer help text.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Command not found — entry point not yet wired in pyproject.toml.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Exit code 0; output contains Usage: and --help description text.

proofUnits.title: Presidio Analyzer smoke test
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: AnalyzerEngine detects an EMAIL_ADDRESS entity in sample text with confidence >= 0.5.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'presidio_analyzer' or test file does not exist.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 1 passed — results list contains at least one finding with entity_type == EMAIL_ADDRESS.

proofUnits.title: Presidio Anonymizer smoke test
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: AnonymizerEngine redacts the detected email, replacing it with <EMAIL_ADDRESS>.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'presidio_anonymizer' or test does not exist.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 1 passed — anonymized text contains <EMAIL_ADDRESS> and not the original email value.

proofUnits.title: spaCy NER smoke test
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: en_core_web_lg loads, processes sample text, returns at least one PERSON entity. Load time logged.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: OSError: [E050] Can't find model 'en_core_web_lg' or test does not exist.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 1 passed — doc.ents contains at least one entity with label_ == PERSON.

proofUnits.title: SQLite CRUD + CSV export smoke test
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: ScanJob created, two Findings saved and queried back, exported to CSV with correct headers and row count.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: ModuleNotFoundError or FileNotFoundError — storage module does not exist.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 3 passed — job creation, finding query, and CSV export all pass. CSV has headers job_id,entity_type,start,end,score,text_snippet and 2 data rows.

objective.statement: Establish the Python project foundation: uv-managed skeleton, Presidio+spaCy detection core, and SQLite findings storage — all verified by passing smoke tests.
successCriteria: uv run scanmenow --help exits 0 with Typer help text
Presidio Analyzer detects EMAIL_ADDRESS in sample text
Presidio Anonymizer redacts EMAIL_ADDRESS in sample text
spaCy en_core_web_lg loads and detects a PERSON entity
SQLite DB initializes, CRUD round-trips findings, CSV export produces correct output

proofMap.criterion: uv run scanmenow --help exits 0 with Typer help text
Presidio Analyzer detects EMAIL_ADDRESS in sample text
Presidio Anonymizer redacts EMAIL_ADDRESS in sample text
spaCy en_core_web_lg loads and detects a PERSON entity
SQLite DB initializes, CRUD round-trips findings, CSV export produces correct output

stopConditions: uv is not installed in the build environment
Presidio cannot be installed due to Python version incompatibility
spaCy model download fails due to network access restrictions

tasks.title: Group B - HIPAA Safe Harbor & Presidio Analysis
tasks.description: Gap analysis of 18 HIPAA Safe Harbor identifiers against Presidio built-ins, identify missing detectors, design detection approach (32 subtasks)

tasks.title: Group C - Synthetic PHI Corpus & Golden Findings
tasks.description: Build synthetic PHI test corpus covering all 18 identifiers with golden findings JSON for validation and accuracy benchmarking (22 subtasks)

tasks.title: Group D - Filesystem Walker & Integration
tasks.description: Local filesystem walker with path resolution, skip patterns, symlink policy, max-depth limits, and end-to-end CLI integration (21 subtasks)

tasks.title: Group E - Cloud & Retention Services
tasks.description: Firestore connection layer with environment flag for local dev, retention policy evaluation, and cloud integration (4 subtasks)

tasks.title: Group F - Phase 1 Exit Gate & Verification
tasks.description: Accuracy threshold validation, CLI functional tests on real fixture directory, documentation, and Phase 1 completion (1 subtask)
